name: Nestor 2pk Acacia Wood Dining Chairs: Water-Resistant Cushions, Christopher Knight Home
description: The outdoor dining experience you create for your guests should be classy, comfortable, and upscale in aesthetic; this pair of slatted Christopher Knight Home Nestor 2Pk Acacia Wood Dining Chairs with water-resistant cushioning will aid you greatly in this endeavor. Thick, substantial frames featuring subtlety tapered legs give these pieces a bold, striking presence, the perfect statement to accompany any dining table you happen to pair them with. Place these Christopher Knight Home Nestor 2Pk Acacia Wood Dining Chairs around a table for outdoor dining or use them as extra seating on your patio.
